put.description: Environment variables let you pass information to your Keycloak Deployment. Environment variables are persistent–they remain in place across deploys and restarts. Unless you need to change a value, you only need to set it once. Whenever you set or remove an environment variable, your deployment is restarted.

publicGpgKey.description: The optional GPG public key to cypher the export

endpoint.description: The AWS S3 like endpoint url

bucketName.description: The name of the bucket you will store the export to

secretKey.description: The secret key used to send the export in the bucket

region.description: The AWS region where the bucket is

filename.description: The name of the export file that will be stored in the bucket
